title: User List no longer shows Last Active
excerpt: The User list in the Admin page used to show Last Active date. It was very useful to know who on my team was actively using monday, and who I needed to follow-up with to get them to use it. Today I noticed it’s just gone…

posts.author: cberman (Corey)
posts.cookedHtml:
The User list in the Admin page used to show Last Active date. It was very useful to know who on my team was actively using monday, and who I needed to follow-up with to get them to use it. Today I noticed it’s just gone from the page, what gives?

image1909×298 26.6 KB
